meta.name: Audit_Quality_MAX
meta.description: MAX-density audit quality kernel with explicit AMOS × TTS × TPE linkage.

kernel.scope: Cross-domain audit quality universe integrating COSO, ISO, Basel, Operational Risk, TTS, TPE, AMOS.

integration.TTS_linkage: Audit indicators mapped to Ω, H, F, S systemic states.
integration.TPE_linkage: Audit failure modes linked to cycle transitions C1–C7.
integration.AMOS_linkage: Full audit logic aligned to AMOS structural pathways.

TTS.description: Maps audit dimensions to Ω (overload), H (health), F (fragmentation), S (shock-sensitivity) at organization level.
TTS.aggregation_rule: TTS_AUDIT_SCORE = f(weighted_sum(Ω, H, F, S deltas across all audit dimensions))

TPE.description: Connects audit patterns to cycle transitions C1–C7 (formation → expansion → overreach → fragmentation → collapse → repair → renewal).

signals.C1_C2: emergent control design, incomplete policies, low but rising Ω
signals.C3: rapid growth, control lag, rising Ω with under-tested safeguards
signals.C4: persistent exceptions, workarounds, policy–practice gaps, H↓, F↑
signals.C5: qualified opinions, regulatory findings, loss events, S↑↑
signals.C6: crisis audits, restatements, enforcement actions, leadership churn
signals.C7: post-crisis rebuild, new baselines, structural simplification

TPE.transition_rule: C_NEXT = g(TTS_AUDIT_SCORE trend + incident density + override frequency).

AMOS.description: Anchors audit logic to AMOS_UNIVERSE_OS_FULL_BUNDLE governance, economy, and risk pathways.
AMOS.propagation_rule: Any audit weakness updates the corresponding AMOS node state and pushes a TTS delta and TPE cycle adjustment.

scoring.definition: Each rule in each domain is scored [0,1]. Domain score = mean(rule_scores). Global AUDIT_QUALITY_INDEX = Σ(w_d × domain_score_d).
scoring.determinism: Given identical inputs, outputs are fixed; no stochastic components allowed in production mode.

incident_to_cycle.definition: Maps cumulative control failures into TPE cycle pressure.

external_alignment: Supports mapping to financial reporting standards and regulatory expectations.
Compatible with standard three-lines-of-defense models without depending on them.

quality_bands.A: AUDIT_QUALITY_INDEX ≥ 0.85 and no high-severity incidents in 24 months.
quality_bands.B: 0.70 ≤ AUDIT_QUALITY_INDEX < 0.85 with limited incidents and corrective actions in place.
quality_bands.C: 0.50 ≤ AUDIT_QUALITY_INDEX < 0.70 with structural gaps; high TPE pressure toward C4/C5.
quality_bands.D: AUDIT_QUALITY_INDEX < 0.50 or repeated severe incidents; immediate C5/C6 risk.

notes: Kernel can be extended with sector-specific audit packs (banking, energy, public sector).
AMOS, TTS, and TPE mappings are designed to remain stable as new rules are added.
